Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> I do not know if 10 runs is enough to proclaim victory, but it seems this patch does the trick.

Yes this seem to work. Thanks for the patch!. Normally, I would ONLY_REPEAT a minumum 50 times. With individual line I thought 10 should be enough. :-). And I see what you mean. So we let this be as is for now and see what regular run  againt maloo brings once this is landed.

parents.subject: LU-17612 sec: return keyring errors to userspace

commit.subject: LU-17057 tests: Fix "...endpoint shutdown" under sanity-sec
commit.message:
LU-17057 tests: Fix "...endpoint shutdown" under sanity-sec

This patch fixes test_0 failing with "Cannot send after
transport endpoint shutdown" by introducing wait_ssk()
in sec_setup() to deterministicly applied SSK flavor.

Test-Parameters: trivial mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 osscount=1 ostcount=8 clientcount=2 testlist=sanity-sec env=SHARED_KEY=true,ONLY=0
